calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To Investigate Trustee Administration, Determine Valid Trust Assets And Liabilities, And Authorize Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Investment Accounts; Cash Account, And Life Insurance Policy Proceeds As Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth Dorsi for and with Mark Walther, Petitioner (in person).
Brian Conners for Mark McMechen, Objector (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the trust assets, that the settlor died and never created a pour-over will, and that there is no instrument that may indicate his intentions to transfer omitted assets into the trust.

The matter is denied by minute order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Investment Accounts; Cash Account, And Life Insurance Policy Proceeds As Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For The Purpose Of Posting Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Mark Mcmechen' Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth Dorsi and Vannessa Ing for Mark Walther, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Mark McMechen, Objector in Pro Per (via Zoom).

Mr. McMechen contested the court's tentative decision. After hearing oral arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling, granting in part and denying in part the motion to quash or for protective order.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For The Purpose Of Posting Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Investment Accounts; Cash Account, And Life Insurance Policy Proceeds As Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Aug-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
